steps.title: Track the two sentences
steps.content: The first sentence states a broad trend: high-speed rail is expanding in many countries. The second sentence introduces Denmark with for instance, so it gives a specific example of that trend.

steps.title: Rule out wrong structures
steps.content: Choice A invents a rejected belief. Choice B says the text questions an action and suggests alternatives, which it does not. Choice C claims the second sentence challenges the first, but it supports it. The answer is D.
